title: The Next Breakthrough Doesn't Have a Name Yet
snippet: “AI is impacting higher education, but it's not going to put higher education out of business,” says UC San Diego Chancellor Pradeep Khosla. Khosla, who earned his Ph.D. in robotics from Carnegie Mellon University, pushed back against the idea that AI will make universities obsolete.
match_reason: social (social_post) — Pradeep K. Khosla is the Chancellor of UC San Diego and co-chair of the UC AI steering committee, who is quoted and featured in this official UC San Diego newsroom article.

title: UCSF Health Converge
snippet: UCSF Health Converge is a health AI accelerator that brings select companies together with UCSF Health clinicians, operators, and technology leaders to build, validate, and scale AI solutions inside real care delivery settings. The program sits within UCSF Health's IT organization under Mark Rauschuber, Chief Information Officer (CIO) for UCSF Health. Oversight of the strategy and day-to-day opera
match_reason: websearch (other) — Mark Rauschuber is the CIO of UCSF Health, and the newly launched UCSF Health Converge AI accelerator program sits directly under his IT organization, with Rauschuber co-leading its strategy and operations.
